response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the video showing Mori Calliope performing. 2. Identified the song as 'Cynical Night Plan' (シニカルナイトプラン) by Ayase via visual analysis. 3. Performed searches for 'シニカルナイトプラン Ayase lyrics' to get the original Japanese lyrics and 'Cynical Night Plan Ayase lyrics english translation' to get the English translation. 4. Verified the lyrics matched the content of the video and formatted them as requested.
response.global_summary: A 3D music video featuring Mori Calliope performing a cover of the song 'Cynical Night Plan', originally by Ayase. The entire video is a continuous performance.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope performs 'Cynical Night Plan' against a backdrop of cityscapes and, later, a glowing cherry blossom tree. Text on screen indicates the song title and credits.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Want to try touching the secret
And inside the night I want to destroy
Let's play a game full of mistakes
It doesn't mean anything in particular
Rubbing my sleepy eyes
Huh? What time is the meeting?
"You still have it wrong"
"You're wrong again"
And then? Who are you?
It hurts to stay like this, but we're both the same
Don't call my name every time our eyes meet
How much do you want to see?
I won't hide it
If you're okay with the me that's pretending, please
Like the scenery falling into my closed eyes
I, becoming hazy, don't belong to anyone
Buy me
So feeling
Don't tease me
Only show it to me
Please have this distorted night
Ah, it's really annoying
With someone somewhere
Crossing the red light, it's fine, right?
No, no, no
You understand, right?
If it were dyed blue
It would be boring
(x2)
Thumping text scrolling by
Syrup wrapped around the words we exchange
Make me excited quickly, look
My ego and someone who is rotting
I can't stand it
As always
Deceived, deceiving, overlapping madness

After that, I just fall

And inside the night I want to destroy
Repeating mistakes
